popularStory.headline: Biography of Sir Gilbert de Haya
popularStory.description:
Sir GILBERT de HAYA, dominus de
Locharret, who was contemporary with that
great hero and patriot sir Gilbert Hay of Errol.

This sir Gilbert was one of the great barons
who swore •calty to king Edward …

zh.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotland是Sir William de la Haye 2nd of Locherworth和Helen Of Strathern的兒子，於1270年出生在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安格雷布利其。他和Margaret Graham of Menteith至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1333年7月19日在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵享年63歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾庫帕爾 安格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotland是Sir William de la Haye 2nd of Locherworth和Helen Of Strathern的儿子，于1270年出生在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安格雷布利其。他和Margaret Graham of Menteith至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1333年7月19日在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵享年63岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾庫帕爾 安格斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Haya
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Muslim: from a personal name based on Arabic ḥayāt ‘life’.
Arabic and Jewish (Sephardic): variant of Khayat ‘tailor’ (khayyāṭ in Arabic).

variants.name: Khayat
meanings: Arabic and Jewish (Sephardic): occupational name for a tailor, Arabic khayyāṭ. Its Arabic bearers are both Muslims and Christians. Compare Hayat 2.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotland was born in 1270, in Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of Sir William de la Haye 2nd of Locherworth and Helen Of Strathern. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Margaret Graham of Menteith. He died on 19 July 1333, in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 63, and was buried in Coupar Angus, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotland est né en 1270, à Gorebridge, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fils de Sir William de la Haye 2nd of Locherworth et Helen Of Strathern. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Margaret Graham of Menteith. Il est décédé le 19 juillet 1333, à Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Coupar Angus, Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotland wurde 1270 in Gorebridge, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Sir William de la Haye 2nd of Locherworth und Helen Of Strathern geboren. Er hatte mit Margaret Graham of Menteith mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Juli 1333 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland und wurde in Coupar Angus, Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotland è nato il nel 1270 nel Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlio di Sir William de la Haye 2nd of Locherworth e Helen Of Strathern. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Margaret Graham of Menteith. Morì il 19 luglio 1333, nel Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Coupar Angus, Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotlandは1270年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンゴアブリッジでSir William de la Haye 2nd of LocherworthとHelen Of Strathernの息子として生まれた。彼はMargaret Graham of Menteithとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1333年7月19日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアブチャンで63歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアコウパー アンガスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotland(은)는 1270년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 고레브리지에서 Sir William de la Haye 2nd of Locherworth(와)과 Helen Of Strathern의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Margaret Graham of Menteith(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1333년 7월 19일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 버챈에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 코우파르 앤구스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotland nasceu em 1270, em Gorebridge, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom filho de Sir William de la Haye 2nd of Locherworth e Helen Of Strathern. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Margaret Graham of Menteith. Ele faleceu em 19 de julho de 1333, em Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Coupar Angus, Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotland родился в 1270 г. в местности горебридж, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Sir William de la Haye 2nd of Locherworth и Helen Of Strathern. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Margaret Graham of Menteith. Он умер 19 июля 1333 г. в местности бучань, абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности коупар ангус, пиртшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotland nació en 1270, en Gorebridge, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido como hijo de Sir William de la Haye 2nd of Locherworth y Helen Of Strathern. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Margaret Graham of Menteith. Murió el 19 de julio de 1333, en Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Coupar Angus, Perthshire, Scotland.
